arts.ttl: Empoli’s D’Aversa confirms Esposito and Colombo to start against Torino

Empoli stunned Verona on Sunday afternoon with an unexpected 4-1 win on the road, as Sebastiano Esposito scored a brace to wrap up a great week for him and the Azzurri. Meanwhile, Torino were able to...

arts.ttl: Empoli vs. Torino to get matchday 16 underway
arts.sum: Torino have won just five of their 24 matches against Empoli in Serie A (D11 L8): among opponents that they have faced more than twice in the competition, only against Parma (20.6%) have the Granata recorded a lower winning percentage than against the Tuscans (20.8%). Empoli are the team that has scored the highest percentage iof their goals in the first half of Serie A this term: 79%, 11 out of 14, including the four in the last matchday against Hellas Verona.

arts.ttl: Serie A | Empoli v Torino: Match Preview
arts.sum: As Empoli prepare to host Torino at the Stadio Carlo Castellani on Friday evening, both teams find themselves in need of a morale-boosting victory. The post Serie A | Empoli v Torino: Match Preview appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Vanoli: “Torino need a win for confidence; Linetty, Njie, and Vlasic are back”
arts.sum: Torino's head coach Paolo Vanoli is gearing up for a crucial match against Empoli as the team seeks to end a lengthy winless streak that dates back to October 25. The post Vanoli: “Torino need a win for confidence; Linetty, Njie, and Vlasic are back” appeared first on FootItalia.com.
